title: T-096 — Reference CSV Import Wizard screen (SET-053, 3-step Pattern-01)
prompt:
# T-096 — Reference CSV Import Wizard screen (SET-053, 3-step Pattern-01)

## Goal
SET-053 Reference CSV Import Wizard production component (spec-driven; no exact prototype).

Spec-driven UI: no exact canonical prototype exists under `design/Monopilot Design System/settings/*.jsx` for this screen. `02-SETTINGS-UX.md SET-053 / reference-import` replaces prototype parity as the authoritative UI contract. Reuse import-export/wizard primitives from `settings/data-screens.jsx`, `settings/admin-screens.jsx`, `settings/modals.jsx`, or root legacy `settings/import-export.jsx` only as visual/pattern references; UX spec is authoritative. Any prototype snippets are element/pattern references only, not 1:1 screen sources. Production contract: data via Server Components (Drizzle); mutations via Server Actions; primitives from `packages/ui` only.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/reference/[code]/import/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/reference/[code]/import/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given the production page renders, it MUST satisfy `02-SETTINGS-UX.md SET-053 / reference-import` as the source of truth. UX spec replaces prototype parity for this task; no wrong/adjacent prototype may be used as a 1:1 source. Reused prototype elements must be limited to matching primitives/patterns and must not change the screen semantics, routes, fields, or states required by the UX spec.
- Given the user uploads a CSV with mismatched header, when step 2 renders, then 'Header mismatch — expected: <list>' is shown and Commit is disabled.
- Given commit succeeds, when step 3 renders, then a summary panel shows actual persisted counts (returned by action) and the parent table view link routes back.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write RTL test that mounts the page with mocked data and asserts the parity AC items + ac_extra coverage.
- GREEN: build component, wire Server Action(s).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/reference/[code]/import/page.test.tsx [create]` and `pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale — translate to production contract.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).
- Do not claim 1:1 prototype parity for this screen; exact prototype is missing and UX spec is authoritative.
